notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to distribution of funds to members of the Shoshone-Bannock Tribes of the Fort Hall Reservation, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–206, § 785 Stat. 738Dec. 18, 1971
